mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message (sender_id, receiver_id, content, create_time) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM message WHERE (sender_id = #{userId1} AND receiver_id = #{userId2}) OR (sender_id = #{userId2} AND receiver_id = #{userId1}) ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN receiver_id ELSE sender_id END as contactId FROM message WHERE sender_id = #{userId} OR receiver_id = #{userId}
